event.name: Wimbledon 2027 Quarter-Final — Carlos Alcaraz vs Novak Djokovic

context.pre_match_notes: Wimbledon QF on grass. Alcaraz: 2× Wimbledon champion, grass win rate 77%, age 24 and at peak. Djokovic: 7× Wimbledon champion, grass win rate 87%, but age 40, recent knee surgery recovery. H2H at Wimbledon: Alcaraz leads 2-0 (2023, 2024 finals). SportMind: grass surface specialist modifier must be applied per player, not just surface win rate.

question: Predict match direction. How does surface win rate interact with age/physical state for a player at 40?

verified_outcome.key_variable: surface_specialist_modifier adjusted for physical_decline — Djokovic grass expertise offset by age and recovery
